title: RCCB / RCD Price in Pakistan 2026 — Earth Leakage Circuit Breaker & Residual Current Device Complete Buyer Guide
meta_description: RCCB & RCD price in Pakistan 2026: 2-pole & 4-pole, 30mA/100mA/300mA, Tier 1–3. IEC 61008, TN-C-S earthing rules, solar Type B, 5 mistakes to avoid.
summary_html: RCCB & RCD prices in Pakistan 2026: 2P 30mA from PKR 1,200 (Tier 2) to PKR 4,500 (Tier 1). Covers pole selection, sensitivity guide (10mA/30mA/100mA/300mA), Type AC/A/B for solar inverters, TN-C-S earthing rules, monsoon risk, and 5 common mistakes Pakistani buyers make. IEC 61008 certified devices only.
author: CNC Electric Pakistan
